seoTitle: Bernier Island vs Bertram — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bernier Island and Bertram. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bernier Island vs Bertram: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bernier Island and Bertram.
heading: Bernier Island vs Bertram — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bernier Island, Western Australia and Bertram, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bernier Island has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Bertram (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bernier Island or Bertram safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bernier Island has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Bertram scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bernier Island scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Bertram scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bernier Island or Bertram?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bernier Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
